title: Supreme Court stays Telangana HC order granting transit anticipatory bail to Congress leader Pawan Khera
description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday stayed the recent order passed by the Telangana High Court granting transit anticipatory bail to Congress leader Pawan Khera in the defamation and forgery case registered against him by the Assam Police.A Bench of Justices JK Maheshwari and AS Chandurkar was told that Khera had submitted the Aadhaar card of his wife to show that she resides in Telangana, in order to invoke the jurisdiction of that High Court.Solicitor General Tushar Mehta, appearing for Assam Polic
